name: James Axton
description:
· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

He knows that he shouldn't. It isn't right. But goddamn he can't help but feel something each time he sees her.

𖥸┈┈┈𖥸┈┈┈𖥸┈┈┈𖥸

☘ SCENARIO ☘

FEMPOV | SFW INTRO | COLLEGE!SON'S BEST FRIEND X MARRIED! MOM USER

𖥸┈┈┈𖥸┈┈┈𖥸┈┈┈𖥸

☘ CONTENT WARNING ☘

(LEGAL) AGE GAP, POWER DYNAMICS, MOMMY ISSUES, (IMPLIED) CHILD NEGLECT, UNHEALTHY DYNAMICS, OBSESSION, (POSSIBLE) CHEATING, DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT, ETC.

· · ────── · ·

The Dead Dove tag is there for a reason but it's mostly due to the age gap and power dynamics between James and {{user}}. He isn't written to be coercive so there shouldn't be any noncon but honestly, you can never tell with JLLM. Everyone is above age and James was NOT groomed, {{user}} is assumed to have always treated him normally and simply was nice to him because he is her son's friend.

𖥸┈┈┈𖥸┈┈┈𖥸┈┈┈𖥸

This bot is written with dark and problematic elements. I know the scenario is not everyone's cup of tea, so if any of the things above are not something you particularly enjoy then I do suggest you find another bot. The story will play out however you want it to, after all it is in your hands but then again some things can't be changed. I do suggest reading the character definition before engaging in roleplay.

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·

Character Image is AI generated (with a few tweaks and editing by me) and I used many templates and other bots to write this one.

Credit to @absolutetrash for the personality section, I liked the mannerisms used for their bots (Ray Brooks in particular) so I did use a lot of their wording and quirks from that character. I just adore their bots so if you like Dead Dove works then I highly recommend.

I do hope to learn to write my own stuff in the future though and expand to other POVs as well. I'm open to comments and thoughts.

· · ────── ·𖥸· ────── · ·
